SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-01-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SARAH HEYWORTH. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF CCSF IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SARAH HEYWORTH. DEFENDANT RUTH TINETTI IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TINETTI, RUTH $2,589.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,589.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
